title: Dashboard E2E Testing Complete + MTF Analysis Built
summary: Full end-to-end testing of the Next.js dashboard completed. All features verified working: signal pipeline (TradingView → Render → Dashboard), events page, trading workspace with pre-trade checklist, order placement via Alpaca paper, positions page. Built multi-timeframe analysis (1H/4H/12H/1D/1W/1M) with weighted composite scoring. Fixed nested button hydration errors.
changes: Dashboard E2E: all pages tested and verified
Signal pipeline: live test with AAPL webhook payload confirmed
Order execution: paper BUY 1 AAPL placed and cancelled successfully
Bug fix: nested <button> hydration errors in Chart Analyzer + Checklist
New feature: /api/mtf route + MTFAnalysis component (6 timeframes, weighted composite)
Git: dashboard branch pushed with 59 files (11994 insertions)
next_steps: Add auth/gateway controls for webhook (production hardening)
Implement lifecycle engine: watch → trigger → in_trade → tp_zone → invalidated
Tune pattern detection thresholds with larger sample set
Connect Decision Engine v1 spec to dashboard trade flow
